name: Ontario MFIPPA
author: BlackBar Team
description: Municipal Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act for Ontario, Canada

jurisdiction.legislation: Municipal Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act

extension_reasons: Meeting time limit would unreasonably interfere with operations

redaction_categories.name: Closed Meetings
redaction_categories.guidance: Information from closed meetings of council, board, commission or committee

redaction_categories.name: Advice to Government
redaction_categories.guidance: Advice or recommendations developed by or for an institution or its employees

redaction_categories.name: Law Enforcement
redaction_categories.guidance: Law enforcement matters including investigations, security, and crime prevention

redaction_categories.name: Relations with Other Governments
redaction_categories.guidance: Information received in confidence from other governments

redaction_categories.name: Third Party Information
redaction_categories.guidance: Commercial, financial, labour relations, scientific or technical information of third parties

redaction_categories.name: Economic Interests
redaction_categories.guidance: Information that could harm economic or financial interests of the institution

redaction_categories.name: Danger to Safety or Health
redaction_categories.guidance: Information that could endanger safety or health of a person

statuses.label: Closed
statuses.description: Request closed (abandoned, withdrawn, or no records)

acknowledgment_letter.name: Acknowledgment Letter
acknowledgment_letter.subject: Acknowledgment of Freedom of Information Request - {tracking_number}

extension_letter.name: Extension Notice
extension_letter.subject: Time Extension Notice - {tracking_number}
extension_letter.body:
Dear {requester_name},

Re: Freedom of Information Request {tracking_number}

This letter is to inform you that we require additional time to process your request under MFIPPA.

Reason for extension: {extension_reason}

The new response date is: {new_due_date}

Under section 20 of MFIPPA, we may extend the time limit for responding to your request for up to 30 days if:
- Meeting the time limit would unreasonably interfere with the operations of the institution
- Consultations are necessary to comply with the request
- A large volume of records is involved
- Additional time is needed for severing

If you have any questions, please contact us at {contact_email}.

Sincerely,
{org_name}
Freedom of Information Coordinator

fee_estimate.name: Fee Estimate
fee_estimate.subject: Fee Estimate - {tracking_number}

response_letter.name: Response Letter
response_letter.subject: Response to Freedom of Information Request - {tracking_number}
response_letter.body:
Dear {requester_name},

Re: Freedom of Information Request {tracking_number}

This letter is in response to your request under MFIPPA received on {received_date}.

Your request was for: {request_description}

DECISION:
{decision_text}

RECORDS DISCLOSED:
{records_summary}

EXEMPTIONS APPLIED:
{exemptions_summary}

RIGHT TO APPEAL:
If you are not satisfied with this decision, you have the right to appeal to the Information and Privacy Commissioner of Ontario within 30 days of receiving this letter.

Office of the Information and Privacy Commissioner of Ontario
2 Bloor Street East, Suite 1400
Toronto, ON M4W 1A8
Phone: 416-326-3333 or 1-800-387-0073
Website: www.ipc.on.ca

If you have any questions, please contact us at {contact_email}.

Sincerely,
{org_name}
Freedom of Information Coordinator

no_records.name: No Records Letter
no_records.subject: No Records Found - {tracking_number}
no_records.body:
Dear {requester_name},

Re: Freedom of Information Request {tracking_number}

This letter is in response to your request under MFIPPA received on {received_date}.

Your request was for: {request_description}

After conducting a thorough search of our records, we have determined that no records exist that are responsive to your request.

Search conducted:
{search_description}

RIGHT TO APPEAL:
If you are not satisfied with this decision, you have the right to appeal to the Information and Privacy Commissioner of Ontario within 30 days of receiving this letter.

Office of the Information and Privacy Commissioner of Ontario
2 Bloor Street East, Suite 1400
Toronto, ON M4W 1A8
Phone: 416-326-3333 or 1-800-387-0073
Website: www.ipc.on.ca

If you have any questions, please contact us at {contact_email}.

Sincerely,
{org_name}
Freedom of Information Coordinator

redaction_analysis.system_prompt: You are an expert Ontario MFIPPA (Municipal Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act) analyst. Analyze documents and identify information that should be exempted under MFIPPA sections 6-14. Focus on personal privacy (s.14), solicitor-client privilege (s.12), third party information (s.10), and law enforcement (s.8).
